title: Sub-workflow inputs not updating in main workflow
symptom: After adding new inputs to a sub-workflow, the main workflow does not reflect these changes when refreshing the input list.
root_cause: n8n requires sub-workflows to be published for changes to be recognized in the main workflow. If the sub-workflow is not published, the main workflow will not update its input list with the new inputs.
fix_steps: Click on 'Publish' to publish the changes
Go back to the main workflow
agent_instruction: Publish the sub-workflow and then refresh the input list in the main workflow.
